name: Sausage Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the Italian sausage into a 1-quart casserole dish.
2. Stir in the chopped onion.
3. Cook on high power for 3½ to 4½ minutes or until the sausage is done and stirring once.
4. Pour off excess fat.
5. Stir in catsup and oregano.
6. Cook on high power for 1 to 1½ minutes, or until the sausage mixture is heated through.
7. Place roll bottoms on a paper towel-lined plate.
8. Spoon some sausage mixture onto each roll bottom.
9. Top each with a slice of cheese and the top of the roll.
10. Cook on high power for an additional 45 seconds to 1 minute, or until the cheese is just melted.
